description: You are preparing a quick-reference guide for a middle school chemistry unit on atoms and molecules using the Sugar Pippy activity. In the Pippy programming environment, write and execute a Python script that reads the periodic table dataset at /home/ga/Documents/elements.csv to extract data for Hydrogen (H), Oxygen (O), Carbon (C), Nitrogen (N), Iron (Fe), Copper (Cu), Gold (Au), and Silver (Ag). The script should generate formatted reference cards for these elements containing their Symbol, Name, Atomic Number, Atomic Mass, Group, and Period. It must also calculate the molecular weights of Water (H2O) and Carbon Dioxide (CO2) using the atomic masses from the dataset. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/periodic_lookup.py and the final report containing the reference cards and molecular weights to /home/ga/Documents/element_report.txt.
